title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: TIGARD HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 9000 SW Durham Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Ages 2–21 in the Tigard-Tualatin School District, including homeschool and private school students and income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Tigard-Tualatin School District Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TIGARD HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
